title_or_label: AI-guided emotional exploration through art metaphor
parent_post: A trip to my emotions art exhibition
post_title: A trip to my emotions art exhibition
excerpt:
Would you like to see my paintings? I've prepared an art exhibition with 4 paintings.

Yes, show me!

Okay so the rooms are themed by emotions. Fear, Anger, Sadness, Happiness.

I would love to see them all.

Which one do you choose first?

Anger.

Alright then, come this way *brings you to anger room and points at the painting*
